entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance and genetic mapping.

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing technique used to develop high-density genetic maps.

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: A process used to narrow down the location of a gene associated with a trait.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying specific genes that likely contribute to a phenotypic trait.

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A devastating peanut disease caused by fungal pathogens.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A devastating peanut disease caused by fungal pathogens.

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that causes significant disease and yield loss in peanut.

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity caused by diseases.

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as markers for constructing genetic maps.

entities.name: HIGH-DENSITY GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A detailed map of genetic markers across the genome used for trait localization.

entities.name: MARKER VALIDATION
entities.description: The process of confirming the association between a genetic marker and a trait.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to link phenotypic traits to specific genomic regions.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING DATA
entities.description: Observations of physical traits used in QTL analysis.

entities.name: MAIN-EFFECT QTL
entities.description: Genomic regions that explain a significant portion of the phenotypic variation for a trait.

entities.name: B05
entities.description: A specific chromosomal location where QTLs for early leaf spot were identified.

entities.name: B03
entities.description: A specific chromosomal location where QTLs for early leaf spot and late leaf spot were identified.

entities.name: A05
entities.description: A specific chromosomal location where a QTL for late leaf spot was identified.

entities.name: B09
entities.description: A specific chromosomal location where a QTL for tomato spotted wilt virus was identified.

entities.name: EPISTASIS
entities.description: The interaction between different genes that affects the phenotype.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to determine how environmental factors influence trait expression.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL EFFECTS
entities.description: External factors that influence the expression of disease resistance traits.

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide the plant with the ability to resist pathogens.

entities.name: R-GENES
entities.description: Resistance genes identified within the QTL regions.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate gene expression, identified within the QTL regions.

entities.name: KASP MARKERS
entities.description: Kompetitive Allele Specific PCR markers developed for major QTLs.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: The use of genomic information to improve crop breeding efficiency.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A population of plants used for genetic mapping and QTL analysis.
